payload.label: fan
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped ceiling-mounted fan with brown wooden blades and a central frosted-glass light dome; metal mounting and blade arms visible, blades extend to the crop edges and appear stationary — estimated ~2.5 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"fan","short_description":"brown wooden-blade ceiling fan edge-crop","long_description":"Partial, edge-cropped ceiling-mounted fan with brown wooden blades and a central frosted-glass light dome; metal mounting and blade arms visible, blades extend to the crop edges and appear stationary — estimated ~2.5 meters from the camera.","attributes":["brown wooden blades","frosted-glass light dome","metal mounting plate","edge-cropped / partial","blades extend to image edges","appears stationary","warm wood finish"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.5}
